purpose: Example Orchestration Spine v1 map for showing how AI_OS worker, packet, lock, approval, validator, launch, recovery, and commit package components fit together without launching anything or changing state.

spine_sections.plain_english_purpose: Shows which workers exist, whether they are standby or assigned, and what packet they are connected to.
spine_sections.next_safe_action: Review worker records before any approved assignment workflow.

spine_sections.plain_english_purpose: Shows available work packets, allowed paths, blocked paths, approval needs, and validator needs.
spine_sections.next_safe_action: Review packet status before approving any APPLY packet.

spine_sections.plain_english_purpose: Shows whether a packet is claimed, who owns it, and whether collision status is clean.
spine_sections.next_safe_action: Confirm no collision before any later approved claim workflow.

spine_sections.plain_english_purpose: Shows pending, approved, and blocked APPLY decisions for operator review.
spine_sections.next_safe_action: Review approval state and stop before any separate approval mutation.

spine_sections.plain_english_purpose: Shows validator order, required validators, optional validators, and blocked validators.
spine_sections.next_safe_action: Review validator order before running validators in a separate approved workflow.

spine_sections.plain_english_purpose: Defines a future gate that would decide whether a packet is safe to launch after approval and validation.
spine_sections.next_safe_action: Keep launch actions blocked until a separate safety-reviewed APPLY phase exists.

spine_sections.plain_english_purpose: Shows last known orchestration state, unfinished packets, pending approvals, and recovery next action.
spine_sections.next_safe_action: Review recovery state before any operator-approved continuation.

spine_sections.plain_english_purpose: Shows a selective commit package recommendation without staging, committing, or pushing.
spine_sections.next_safe_action: Review package scope and require a separate explicit commit approval.

global_safety_rules: No broker, OANDA, API keys, webhooks, real orders, or live trading.
No validator launching from this spine display.

next_safe_action.action: Run the read-only spine display and review git status before any later APPLY, commit, or push approval.
next_safe_action.stop_condition: Stop if any requested action would modify protected files, launch workers, create scheduled tasks, touch broker or live trading, commit, or push.
